name: Archive
text: +1 Action Set aside the top 3 cards of your deck face down (you may look at them). Now and at the start of your next two turns, put one into your hand.

name: Capital
text: (6) +1 Buy | When you discard this from play, +(6).

name: Castles
text: Sort the Castle pile cost, putting the more expensive Castles on the bottom. For a 2player game, use only one of each Castle. Only the top card of the pile can be gained or bought.

name: Humble Castle
text: (1) | Worth {1} per Castle you have.

name: Crumbling Castle
text: {1} | When you gain or trash this, +{1} and gain a Silver.

name: Small Castle
text: Trash this or a Castle from your hand. If you do, gain a Castle. | {2}

name: Haunted Castle
text: {2} | When you gain this during your turn, gain a Gold, and each other player with 5 or more cards in hand puts 2 of them onto their deck.

name: Opulent Castle
text: Discard any number of Victory cards, revealed. +(2) per card discarded. | {3}

name: Sprawling Castle
text: {4} | When you gain this, gain a Duchy or 3 Estates.

name: Grand Castle
text: {5} | When you gain this, reveal your hand. +{1} per Victory card in your hand andor in play.

name: King's Castle
text: Worth {2} per Castle you have.

name: Catapult
text: +(1) Trash a card from your hand. If it costs (3) or more, each other player gains a Curse. If its a Treasure, each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.

name: Rocks
text: (1) | When you gain or trash this: If its your Buy phase, gain a Silver onto your deck, otherwise gain a Silver to your hand.

name: Chariot Race
text: +1 Action +1 Card, revealing it. The player to your left reveals the top card of their deck. If your card costs more, +(1) and +{1}.

name: Charm
text: Choose one: +1 Buy and +(2); or the next time you gain a card this turn, you may also gain a differently named card with the same cost.

name: City Quarter
text: +2 Actions Reveal your hand. +1 Card per Action card revealed.

name: Crown
text: If its your Action phase, you may play an Action from your hand twice. If its your Buy phase, you may play a Treasure from your hand twice.

name: Encampment
text: +2 Cards +2 Actions You may reveal a Gold or Plunder from your hand. If you do not, set this aside, and return it to its pile at the start of Cleanup.

name: Enchantress
text: Until your next turn, the first time each other player plays an Action card on their turn, they get +1 Card and +1 Action instead of following its instructions. At the start of your next turn, +2 Cards

name: Engineer
text: Gain a card costing up to (4). You may trash this. If you do, gain a card costing up to (4).

name: Farmers' Market
text: +1 Buy If there are {4} or more on the Farmers Market pile, take them and trash this. Otherwise, add {1} to the pile and then +(1) per {1} on the pile.

name: Forum
text: +3 Cards +1 Action Discard 2 cards. | When you gain this, +1 Buy.

name: Gladiator
text: +(2) Reveal a card from your hand. The player to your left may reveal a copy from their hand. If they dont, +(1) and trash a Gladiator from its pile.

name: Fortune
text: +1 Buy Double your (_) if you havent yet this turn. | When you gain this, gain a Gold per Gladiator you have in play.

name: Groundskeeper
text: +1 Card +1 Action This turn, when you gain a Victory card, +{1}.

name: Legionary
text: +(3) You may reveal a Gold from your hand. If you do, each other player discards down to 2 cards in hand, then draws a card.

name: Overlord
text: Play a nonCommand nonDuration Action card from the Supply costing up to (5), leaving it there.

name: Patrician
text: +1 Card +1 Action Reveal the top card of your deck. If it costs (5) or more, put it into your hand.

name: Emporium
text: +1 Card +1 Action +(1) | When you gain this, if you have at least 5 Action cards in play, +{2}.

name: Royal Blacksmith
text: +5 Cards Reveal your hand; discard the Coppers.

name: Sacrifice
text: Trash a card from your hand. If its an Action card, +2 Cards and +2 Actions Treasure card, +(2) Victory card, +{2}

name: Settlers
text: +1 Card +1 Action You may reveal a Copper from your discard pile and put it into your hand.

name: Bustling Village
text: +1 Card +3 Actions You may reveal a Settlers from your discard pile and put it into your hand.

name: Temple
text: +{1} Trash from 1 to 3 differently named cards from your hand. Add {1} to the Temple pile. | When you gain this, take the from the Temple pile.

name: Villa
text: +2 Actions +1 Buy +(1) | When you gain this, put it into your hand, +1 Action, and if its your Buy phase return to your Action phase.

name: Wild Hunt
text: Choose one: +3 Cards and add {1} to the Wild Hunt pile; or gain an Estate, and if you do, take the from the pile.

name: Advance
text: You may trash an Action card from your hand. If you do, gain an Action card costing up to (6).

name: Annex
text: Look through your discard pile. Shuffle all but up to 5 cards from it into your deck. Gain a Duchy.

name: Banquet
text: Gain 2 Coppers and a nonVictory card costing up to (5).

name: Conquest
text: Gain 2 Silvers. +{1} per Silver youve gained this turn.

name: Delve
text: +1 Buy Gain a Silver.

name: Dominate
text: Gain a Province. If you do, +{9}.

name: Donate
text: At the start of your next turn, first, put your deck and discard pile into your hand, trash any number of cards from it, then shuffle the rest into your deck and draw 5 cards.

name: Ritual
text: Gain a Curse. If you do, trash a card from your hand. +{1} per (1) it costs.

name: Salt the Earth
text: +{1} Trash a Victory card from the Supply.

name: Tax
text: Add <2> to a Supply pile. | Setup: Add <1> to each Supply pile. When a player gains a card in their Buy phase, they take the <_> from its pile.

name: Triumph
text: Gain an Estate. If you did, +{1} per card youve gained this turn.

name: Wedding
text: +{1} Gain a Gold.

name: Windfall
text: If your deck and discard pile are empty, gain 3 Golds.

name: Aqueduct
text: When you gain a Treasure, move {1} from its pile to this. When you gain a Victory card, take the from this. | Setup: Put {8} on the Silver and Gold piles.

name: Arena
text: At the start of your Buy phase, you may discard an Action card. If you do, take {2} from here. | Setup: Put {6} here per player.

name: Bandit Fort
text: When scoring, for each Silver and each Gold you have.

name: Basilica
text: When you gain a card in your Buy phase, if you have (2) or more, take {2} from here. | Setup: Put {6} here per player.

name: Baths
text: When you end your turn without having gained a card, take {2} from here. | Setup: Put {6} here per player.

name: Battlefield
text: When you gain a Victory card, take {2} from here. | Setup: Put {6} here per player.

name: Colonnade
text: When you gain an Action card in your Buy phase, if you have a copy of it in play, take {2} from here. | Setup: Put {6} here per player.

name: Defiled Shrine
text: When you gain an Action, move {1} from its pile to this. When you gain a Curse in your Buy phase, take the from this. | Setup: Put {2} on each nonGathering Action Supply pile.

name: Fountain
text: When scoring, {15} if you have at least 10 Coppers.

name: Keep
text: When scoring, {5} per differently named Treasure you have, that you have more copies of than each other player, or tied for most.

name: Labyrinth
text: When you gain a card in one of your turns, take {2} from here. | Setup: Put {6} here per player.

name: Mountain Pass
text: When you are the first player to gain a Province, each player bids once, up to <40>, ending with you. High bidder gets +{8} and takes the <_> they bid.

name: Museum
text: When scoring, {2} per differently named card you have.

name: Obelisk
text: When scoring, {2} per card you have from the chosen pile. | Setup: Choose a random Action Supply pile.

name: Orchard
text: When scoring, {4} per differently named Action card you have 3 or more copies of.

name: Palace
text: When scoring, {3} per set you have of Copper Silver Gold.

name: Tomb
text: When you trash a card, +{1}.

name: Tower
text: When scoring, {1} per nonVictory card you have from an empty Supply pile.

name: Triumphal Arch
text: When scoring, {3} per copy you have of the most common Action card among your cards (if its a tie, count either).

name: Wall
text: When scoring, per card you have after the first

name: Wolf Den
text: When scoring, per card you have exactly one copy of.
